text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I spent the time I wasn't able to sleep working...
What's wrong with that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Anyway, keep your nose out of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After staying up late working because she
couldn't sleep, Air Shakur seems drowsy all day.
